case_title: DOROTHY MAYES VS. AIMCO DBA BAYVIEW APARTMENTS

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-16-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAYES, DOROTHY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AIMCO DBA BAYVIEW APARTMENTS $300.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $300.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
